# Elite Enhancements: Practical Implementation Guide
**Purpose**: Code-ready examples for immediate implementation  
**Effort**: 4-6 hours for Phase 1 (foundation)  
**Risk**: LOW (all backward-compatible, test in dev first)

---

## Implementation 1: Unified Environment Variables

### Step 1: Create `.env.tpl` Template

**File**: `terraform/.env.tpl`

```bash
# ⚠️ GENERATED BY TERRAFORM — DO NOT COMMIT
# Generated: terraform apply
# Edit: terraform/variables.tf and terraform.tfvars, then re-run terraform

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SERVICE CONFIGURATION
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
CODE_SERVER_PASSWORD=${code_server_password}
CODE_SERVER_PORT=${code_server_port}
DOMAIN=${domain}
ENVIRONMENT=${environment}
LOG_LEVEL=${log_level}
REGION=${region}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# OAUTH2 CONFIGURATION
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=${google_client_id}
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=${google_client_secret}
OAUTH2_PROXY_PORT=${oauth2_proxy_port}
OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET=${oauth2_proxy_cookie_secret}
OAUTH2_PROXY_SESSION_STORAGE=${oauth2_session_storage}
OAUTH2_REDIRECT_URL=https://${domain}/oauth/callback

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DATABASE: POSTGRESQL
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
POSTGRES_USER=${postgres_user}
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${postgres_password}
POSTGRES_DATABASE=${postgres_database}
POSTGRES_PORT=${postgres_port}
POSTGRES_HOST=postgres
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://${postgres_user}:${postgres_password}@postgres:${postgres_port}/${postgres_database}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# CACHE: REDIS
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
REDIS_PASSWORD=${redis_password}
REDIS_PORT=${redis_port}
REDIS_HOST=redis
REDIS_URL=redis://:${redis_password}@redis:${redis_port}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# OBSERVABILITY: PROMETHEUS, GRAFANA, ALERTMANAGER
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
PROMETHEUS_PORT=${prometheus_port}
GRAFANA_ADMIN_USER=${grafana_admin_user}
GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${grafana_admin_password}
GRAFANA_PORT=${grafana_port}
ALERTMANAGER_PORT=${alertmanager_port}
JAEGER_PORT=${jaeger_port}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DEPLOYMENT INFO (for scripts and tools)
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
DEPLOY_HOST=${deploy_host}
DEPLOY_USER=${deploy_user}
DEPLOY_PORT=${deploy_port}
DOCKER_HOST=${docker_host}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FEATURE FLAGS
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ENABLE_MONITORING=${enable_monitoring}
ENABLE_HTTPS=${enable_https}
ENABLE_BACKUP=${enable_backup}
ENABLE_REPLICATION=${enable_replication}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# DEPRECATED / LEGACY (kept for compatibility)
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# These variables are deprecated. Use the canonical names above.
# Support will be removed in v2.0.0
# 
# oauth2_proxy_cookie_secret -> OAUTH2_PROXY_COOKIE_SECRET
# PG_USER -> POSTGRES_USER
# PG_PASSWORD -> POSTGRES_PASSWORD
```

### Step 2: Update `terraform/variables.tf`

Add this section at the end:

```hcl
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# CONSOLIDATED ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES (All .env values defined here)
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

variable "code_server_port" {
  description = "Code-Server port (internal)"
  type        = number
  default     = 8080
}

variable "oauth2_proxy_port" {
  description = "OAuth2-proxy port"
  type        = number
  default     = 4180
}

variable "postgres_user" {
  description = "PostgreSQL superuser name"
  type        = string
  default     = "postgres"
}

variable "postgres_password" {
  description = "PostgreSQL superuser password"
  type        = string
  sensitive   = true
  default     = "postgres-change-me"
  
  validation {
    condition     = length(var.postgres_password) >= 8
    error_message = "postgres_password must be at least 8 characters."
  }
}

variable "postgres_database" {
  description = "Primary PostgreSQL database name"
  type        = string
  default     = "codeserver"
}

variable "postgres_port" {
  description = "PostgreSQL port"
  type        = number
  default     = 5432
}

variable "redis_password" {
  description = "Redis password"
  type        = string
  sensitive   = true
  default     = "redis-change-me"
  
  validation {
    condition     = length(var.redis_password) >= 8
    error_message = "redis_password must be at least 8 characters."
  }
}

variable "redis_port" {
  description = "Redis port"
  type        = number
  default     = 6379
}

variable "prometheus_port" {
  description = "Prometheus port"
  type        = number
  default     = 9090
}

variable "grafana_admin_user" {
  description = "Grafana admin username"
  type        = string
  default     = "admin"
}

variable "grafana_admin_password" {
  description = "Grafana admin password"
  type        = string
  sensitive   = true
  default     = "admin123"
  
  validation {
    condition     = length(var.grafana_admin_password) >= 8
    error_message = "grafana_admin_password must be at least 8 characters."
  }
}

variable "grafana_port" {
  description = "Grafana port"
  type        = number
  default     = 3000
}

variable "alertmanager_port" {
  description = "AlertManager port"
  type        = number
  default     = 9093
}

variable "jaeger_port" {
  description = "Jaeger UI port"
  type        = number
  default     = 16686
}

variable "oauth2_session_storage" {
  description = "Session storage backend for OAuth2 (redis or memory)"
  type        = string
  default     = "redis"
  
  validation {
    condition     = contains(["redis", "memory"], var.oauth2_session_storage)
    error_message = "oauth2_session_storage must be 'redis' or 'memory'."
  }
}

variable "enable_monitoring" {
  description = "Enable monitoring stack (Prometheus, Grafana, AlertManager)"
  type        = bool
  default     = true
}

variable "enable_https" {
  description = "Enable HTTPS/TLS for Caddy (via Let's Encrypt)"
  type        = bool
  default     = true
}

variable "enable_backup" {
  description = "Enable automated database backups"
  type        = bool
  default     = true
}

variable "enable_replication" {
  description = "Enable database replication to standby host"
  type        = bool
  default     = false
}
```

### Step 3: Update `terraform/main.tf`

Replace the existing `.env` resource:

```hcl
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# RESOURCE: Generate unified .env file from template
# 
# This is GENERATED from Terraform, never manually edited.
# All values come from terraform/variables.tf and terraform.tfvars.
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

resource "local_file" "env_file" {
  filename = "${path.module}/.env"
  
  content = templatefile("${path.module}/.env.tpl", {
    # Service configuration
    code_server_port        = local.code_server_port
    oauth2_proxy_port       = var.oauth2_proxy_port
    postgres_port           = var.postgres_port
    redis_port              = var.redis_port
    prometheus_port         = var.prometheus_port
    grafana_port            = var.grafana_port
    alertmanager_port       = var.alertmanager_port
    jaeger_port             = var.jaeger_port
    
    # Secrets
    code_server_password           = var.code_server_password
    google_client_id               = var.google_client_id
    google_client_secret           = var.google_client_secret
    oauth2_proxy_cookie_secret     = var.oauth2_proxy_cookie_secret
    postgres_user                  = var.postgres_user
    postgres_password              = var.postgres_password
    postgres_database              = var.postgres_database
    redis_password                 = var.redis_password
    grafana_admin_user             = var.grafana_admin_user
    grafana_admin_password         = var.grafana_admin_password
    
    # Connection info
    domain                  = var.domain
    oauth2_session_storage  = var.oauth2_session_storage
    
    # Deployment info
    deploy_host   = local.deployment_host
    deploy_user   = var.deployment_user
    deploy_port   = var.deployment_port
    docker_host   = local.docker_host
    
    # Metadata
    environment   = var.environment
    log_level     = var.log_level
    region        = local.region
    
    # Feature flags
    enable_monitoring   = var.enable_monitoring
    enable_https        = var.enable_https
    enable_backup       = var.enable_backup
    enable_replication  = var.enable_replication
  })

  depends_on = [null_resource.workspace_setup]

  lifecycle {
    ignore_changes = []  # Always regenerate on terraform apply
  }
}

# Add to .gitignore
resource "local_file" "gitignore_env" {
  filename = "${path.module}/.gitignore"
  
  content = file("${path.module}/.gitignore.base") != "" ? 
    file("${path.module}/.gitignore.base") : <<-EOT
# Generated files (secrets)
.env
.env.local
.terraform/
terraform.tfstate*

# IDE
.vscode/
.idea/

# OS
.DS_Store
*.swp
*.swo
EOT

  lifecycle {
    ignore_changes = [content]  # Don't overwrite manual .gitignore entries
  }
}

# Output for verification
output "env_file_location" {
  description = "Location of generated .env file"
  value       = local_file.env_file.filename
}
```

### Step 4: Update `docker-compose.yml`

Simplify by removing hardcoded env vars:

```yaml
version: "3.8"

services:
  code-server:
    image: codercom/code-server:4.115.0
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - PASSWORD=${CODE_SERVER_PASSWORD}
      - PORT=${CODE_SERVER_PORT}
    env_file:
      - .env  # ← Load all variables from generated .env
    networks:
      - code-server-network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:${CODE_SERVER_PORT}/healthz"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  postgresql:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=${POSTGRES_USER}
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DATABASE}
    ports:
      - "${POSTGRES_PORT}:5432"
    env_file:
      - .env
    volumes:
      - codeserver-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    networks:
      - code-server-network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "pg_isready", "-U", "${POSTGRES_USER}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    command: redis-server --requirepass ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
    ports:
      - "${REDIS_PORT}:6379"
    env_file:
      - .env
    networks:
      - code-server-network
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "${REDIS_PASSWORD}", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

networks:
  code-server-network:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  codeserver-data:
```

---

## Implementation 2: Parameterized Caddyfile

### Step 1: Create `terraform/caddyfile.tpl`

```caddy
{
	admin off
	log {
		format json
		output stdout
		level ${log_level}
	}

	# Let's Encrypt configuration
	acme_ca ${acme_ca_url}
	email ${admin_email}
}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Global security headers (applied to all sites)
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
(security_headers) {
	header {
		X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff"
		X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN"
		X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block"
		Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
		Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=${hsts_max_age}; includeSubDomains; preload"
		-Server
	}
}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Main production domain with OAuth2
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
${domain} {
	encode gzip
	import security_headers

	# Reverse proxy to OAuth2-proxy
	reverse_proxy oauth2-proxy:${oauth2_proxy_port} {
		header_up Host {upstream_hostport}
		header_up X-Real-IP {remote_host}
		header_up X-Forwarded-For {remote_host}
		header_up X-Forwarded-Proto {scheme}
	}

	# OAuth2 callback endpoint (public)
	@oauth2_callback path /oauth/*
	handle @oauth2_callback {
		reverse_proxy oauth2-proxy:${oauth2_proxy_port}
	}

	# Metrics endpoint (protected, internal only)
	%{if enable_metrics~}
	@metrics_endpoint path /metrics*
	handle @metrics_endpoint {
		remote_ip ${metrics_allowed_ips}
		reverse_proxy prometheus:${prometheus_port}
	}
	%{endif~}
}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Internal monitoring domain (if enabled and internal DNS available)
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
%{if enable_monitoring && domain_internal != "local"~}

prometheus.${domain_internal} {
	import security_headers
	
	# Basic auth for monitoring
	@protected path /
	handle @protected {
		basicauth / {
			${prometheus_user} ${prometheus_password_hash}
		}
		reverse_proxy prometheus:${prometheus_port}
	}
}

grafana.${domain_internal} {
	import security_headers
	reverse_proxy grafana:${grafana_port}
}

alertmanager.${domain_internal} {
	import security_headers
	basicauth / {
		${alertmanager_user} ${alertmanager_password_hash}
	}
	reverse_proxy alertmanager:${alertmanager_port}
}

jaeger.${domain_internal} {
	import security_headers
	basicauth / {
		${jaeger_user} ${jaeger_password_hash}
	}
	reverse_proxy jaeger:${jaeger_port}
}

%{endif~}

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Additional reverse proxies (dynamically generated)
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
%{for proxy in reverse_proxies~}

${proxy.domain} {
	import security_headers
	encode gzip
	
	%{if proxy.require_auth~}
	basicauth / {
		${proxy.auth_user} ${proxy.auth_password_hash}
	}
	%{endif~}
	
	reverse_proxy ${proxy.target_host}:${proxy.target_port} {
		%{if proxy.strip_path~}
		uri strip_prefix ${proxy.strip_path}
		%{endif~}
	}
}

%{endfor~}
```

### Step 2: Update `terraform/main.tf`

Add resource to generate Caddyfile:

```hcl
resource "local_file" "caddyfile" {
  filename = "${path.module}/Caddyfile"
  
  content = templatefile("${path.module}/caddyfile.tpl", {
    domain                     = var.domain
    domain_internal            = var.domain_internal
    oauth2_proxy_port          = var.oauth2_proxy_port
    prometheus_port            = var.prometheus_port
    grafana_port               = var.grafana_port
    alertmanager_port          = var.alertmanager_port
    jaeger_port                = var.jaeger_port
    log_level                  = var.log_level
    admin_email                = var.admin_email
    acme_ca_url                = var.acme_ca_url
    hsts_max_age               = var.hsts_max_age
    enable_monitoring          = var.enable_monitoring
    enable_metrics             = var.enable_metrics
    metrics_allowed_ips        = var.metrics_allowed_ips
    prometheus_user            = "prometheus"
    prometheus_password_hash   = var.prometheus_password_hash
    alertmanager_user          = "alertmanager"
    alertmanager_password_hash = var.alertmanager_password_hash
    jaeger_user                = "jaeger"
    jaeger_password_hash       = var.jaeger_password_hash
    reverse_proxies = [
      for proxy in var.reverse_proxies : {
        domain              = proxy.domain
        target_host         = proxy.target_host
        target_port         = proxy.target_port
        require_auth        = lookup(proxy, "require_auth", false)
        auth_user           = lookup(proxy, "auth_user", "")
        auth_password_hash  = lookup(proxy, "auth_password_hash", "")
        strip_path          = lookup(proxy, "strip_path", "")
      }
    ]
  })
}
```

### Step 3: Add Variables to `terraform/variables.tf`

```hcl
variable "admin_email" {
  description = "Email for Let's Encrypt certificate notifications"
  type        = string
  default     = "ops@elevatediq.ai"
}

variable "acme_ca_url" {
  description = "ACME endpoint URL (Let's Encrypt production or staging)"
  type        = string
  default     = "https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory"
}

variable "hsts_max_age" {
  description = "HSTS max-age header value (seconds)"
  type        = number
  default     = 31536000  # 1 year
}

variable "domain_internal" {
  description = "Internal domain for monitoring (LAN only)"
  type        = string
  default     = "local"
}

variable "enable_metrics" {
  description = "Enable metrics endpoint exposure"
  type        = bool
  default     = false
}

variable "metrics_allowed_ips" {
  description = "IP addresses allowed to access metrics"
  type        = string
  default     = "127.0.0.1"
}

variable "prometheus_password_hash" {
  description = "Bcrypt hash of Prometheus basic auth password"
  type        = string
  sensitive   = true
  default     = ""
}

variable "reverse_proxies" {
  description = "Additional reverse proxy configurations"
  type = list(object({
    domain              = string
    target_host         = string
    target_port         = number
    require_auth        = optional(bool, false)
    auth_user           = optional(string, "")
    auth_password_hash  = optional(string, "")
    strip_path          = optional(string, "")
  }))
  default = []
}
```

---

## Implementation 3: Environment-Specific Configuration

### Create `terraform/environments/development.tfvars`

```hcl
environment              = "development"
log_level                = "debug"
enable_monitoring        = false
enable_https             = false
enable_backup            = false
acme_ca_url              = "https://acme-staging-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory"

code_server_password     = "devpass123"
postgres_password        = "devpass123"
redis_password           = "devpass123"
grafana_admin_password   = "devpass123"
oauth2_proxy_cookie_secret = "dev-cookie-secret-32-chars-minimum-"

domain                   = "code-server.local"
domain_internal          = "local"
```

### Create `terraform/environments/staging.tfvars`

```hcl
environment       = "staging"
log_level         = "info"
enable_monitoring = true
enable_https      = true
enable_backup     = true
acme_ca_url       = "https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory"

domain            = "staging.elevatediq.ai"
domain_internal   = "staging.internal.elevatediq.ai"
```

### Create `terraform/environments/production.tfvars`

```hcl
environment       = "production"
log_level         = "warn"
enable_monitoring = true
enable_https      = true
enable_backup     = true
enable_replication = true
acme_ca_url       = "https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory"

domain            = "ide.elevatediq.ai"
domain_internal   = "internal.elevatediq.ai"
hsts_max_age      = 31536000
```

### Usage

```bash
# Development
terraform apply -var-file=environments/development.tfvars

# Staging
terraform apply -var-file=environments/staging.tfvars

# Production
terraform apply -var-file=environments/production.tfvars
```

---

## Implementation 4: Health Check Library

### Add to `terraform/locals.tf`

```hcl
locals {
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # HEALTH CHECK TEMPLATES (reusable across all services)
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  
  health_check_templates = {
    http = {
      test           = "CMD"
      args           = ["curl", "-f", "http://localhost:@@PORT@@/@@PATH@@"]
      interval       = "30s"
      timeout        = "10s"
      retries        = 3
      start_period   = "30s"
    }
    
    http_fast = {
      test           = "CMD"
      args           = ["curl", "-f", "http://localhost:@@PORT@@/@@PATH@@"]
      interval       = "10s"
      timeout        = "5s"
      retries        = 2
      start_period   = "10s"
    }
    
    postgres = {
      test           = "CMD"
      args           = ["pg_isready", "-h", "localhost", "-U", "postgres"]
      interval       = "10s"
      timeout        = "5s"
      retries        = 3
      start_period   = "10s"
    }
    
    redis = {
      test           = "CMD"
      args           = ["redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval       = "10s"
      timeout        = "5s"
      retries        = 3
      start_period   = "5s"
    }
  }

  # Resource limits (single source of truth)
  resource_limits = {
    code_server = {
      cpu_limit       = "2.0"
      cpu_reservation = "1.0"
      memory_limit    = "4096m"
      memory_res      = "2048m"
    }
    oauth2_proxy = {
      cpu_limit       = "0.5"
      cpu_reservation = "0.1"
      memory_limit    = "256m"
      memory_res      = "128m"
    }
    postgresql = {
      cpu_limit       = "2.0"
      cpu_reservation = "1.0"
      memory_limit    = "2048m"
      memory_res      = "1024m"
    }
    redis = {
      cpu_limit       = "1.0"
      cpu_reservation = "0.5"
      memory_limit    = "1024m"
      memory_res      = "512m"
    }
    prometheus = {
      cpu_limit       = "1.0"
      cpu_reservation = "0.5"
      memory_limit    = "1024m"
      memory_res      = "512m"
    }
    grafana = {
      cpu_limit       = "0.5"
      cpu_reservation = "0.25"
      memory_limit    = "512m"
      memory_res      = "256m"
    }
  }
}
```

---

## Implementation 5: Feature Flags

### Add to `terraform/variables.tf`

```hcl
variable "services" {
  description = "Services to deploy and enable"
  type = object({
    code_server     = bool
    oauth2_proxy    = bool
    postgresql      = bool
    redis           = bool
    prometheus      = bool
    grafana         = bool
    alertmanager    = bool
    jaeger          = bool
    ollama          = bool
  })
  
  default = {
    code_server     = true
    oauth2_proxy    = true
    postgresql      = true
    redis           = true
    prometheus      = true
    grafana         = true
    alertmanager    = true
    jaeger          = true
    ollama          = false  # Disabled by default (GPU-intensive)
  }
}
```

### Usage in docker-compose template

```hcl
# Conditionally generate services
%{if var.services.prometheus~}
prometheus:
  image: ${local.docker_images.prometheus}
  ports:
    - "${var.prometheus_port}:9090"
  networks:
    - code-server-network
  restart: unless-stopped
%{endif~}

%{if var.services.grafana~}
grafana:
  image: ${local.docker_images.grafana}
  ports:
    - "${var.grafana_port}:3000"
  networks:
    - code-server-network
  restart: unless-stopped
%{endif~}
```

---

## Quick Test: Verify Implementation

```bash
# 1. Initialize Terraform
terraform init

# 2. Validate syntax
terraform validate

# 3. Plan changes (preview)
terraform plan -var-file=environments/development.tfvars

# 4. Apply (generates .env and Caddyfile)
terraform apply -var-file=environments/development.tfvars

# 5. Verify .env generated
cat .env | head -20

# 6. Verify Caddyfile generated
cat Caddyfile | head -20

# 7. Start services
docker-compose up -d

# 8. Check services
docker-compose ps
```

---

## Rollback / Undo

```bash
# If something breaks, revert to previous state
git checkout -- .env Caddyfile

# Or restore from terraform state
terraform destroy -var-file=environments/development.tfvars
terraform apply -var-file=environments/development.tfvars
```

---

## Success Metrics

After implementing these changes:

✅ **Single .env file** (generated from Terraform)  
✅ **Parameterized Caddyfile** (no hardcoded domains/ports)  
✅ **Environment-specific configs** (dev/staging/prod via .tfvars)  
✅ **Feature flags** (enable/disable services)  
✅ **Health check library** (reusable across all services)  
✅ **Resource limits centralized** (easy to adjust for all services)  

**Result**: Multi-environment deployments, reduced duplication, easier maintenance.

---

*Implementation guide completed April 15, 2026*
